narrative:
Watertown (precinct in Washington County) has 1,116 registered voters, with 53.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.7 percentage points.
